title: ADD rule frontmatter
description: Schema for YAML frontmatter of every rule file in core/rules/. Validated in CI.

autoload.description: Whether this rule loads automatically when a session starts. ADD extension. Adding a new autoload: true rule is equivalent to adding system prompt content — requires CODEOWNER approval per SECURITY.md.

maturity.description: Minimum project maturity at which this rule activates. See maturity-loader.md for filtering logic.

description.description: Optional one-line summary of the rule. Metadata only — not shown to agent at runtime.

globs.description: Optional glob list scoping the rule to specific files (used by scoped-application rules like design-system).
